SEARCH
Package bupt.ta.service

Class InterviewBookingService

java.lang.Object
bupt.ta.service.InterviewBookingService
public class InterviewBookingService extends Object
Coordinates bookable interview slots for applicants and module organisers.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    InterviewBookingService.ActionResult
    Success or failure from a booking action with a user-facing message.
    static final class 
    InterviewBookingService.SlotSummary
    Interview slot with current bookings and remaining capacity.

  • Method Details

    • buildSlotSummaries

      public List<InterviewBookingService.SlotSummary> buildSlotSummaries(DataStorage storage, String jobId) throws IOException
      Builds slot summaries including booked applicants for one job.
      Parameters:
      storage - persistence
      jobId - job posting id
      Returns:
      slot summaries with booking lists
      Throws:
      IOException - if data cannot be read

    • createSlot

      public InterviewBookingService.ActionResult createSlot(DataStorage storage, String moId, String jobId, String startsAtRaw, String durationRaw, String location, String notes, String capacityRaw) throws IOException
      Creates an interview slot for an MO-owned job posting.
      Returns:
      success flag and user-facing detail message
      Throws:
      IOException

    • deleteSlot

      public InterviewBookingService.ActionResult deleteSlot(DataStorage storage, String moId, String jobId, String slotId) throws IOException
      Deletes an interview slot that has no bookings.
      Returns:
      success flag and user-facing detail message
      Throws:
      IOException

      public InterviewBookingService.ActionResult bookSlot(DataStorage storage, String applicantId, String applicationId, String slotId) throws IOException
      Books an interview slot for a TA application.
      Returns:
      success flag and user-facing detail message
      Throws:
